sql.query: WITH je AS (SELECT fa.dateacct, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY fa.dateacct, fa.fact_acct_group_id) AS entry_no, COALESCE(MAX(dt.name), 'Journal') AS document_type, fa.fact_acct_group_id, fa.record_id, fa.ad_table_id, fa.acctvalue AS account_no, fa.acctdescription AS account_name, SUM(fa.amtacctdr) AS amtacctdr, SUM(fa.amtacctcr) AS amtacctcr, MIN(fa.seqno) AS min_seqno FROM fact_acct fa LEFT JOIN c_doctype dt ON dt.c_doctype_id = fa.c_doctype_id WHERE fa.ad_client_id IN ('__CLIENT_ID__') AND fa.factaccttype IN ('C','N','O','R','D') AND ('__DATEFROM__' = '' OR fa.dateacct >= '__DATEFROM__'::date) AND ('__DATETO__' = '' OR fa.dateacct <= '__DATETO__'::date) AND ('__ORGID__' = '' OR fa.ad_org_id = '__ORGID__') AND ('__ACCTSCHEMAID__' = '' OR fa.c_acctschema_id = '__ACCTSCHEMAID__') AND ('__BPARTNERID__' = '' OR fa.c_bpartner_id = '__BPARTNERID__') AND ('__PRODUCTID__' = '' OR fa.m_product_id = '__PRODUCTID__') AND ('__PROJECTID__' = '' OR fa.c_project_id = '__PROJECTID__') AND ('__FROMACCOUNTID__' = '' OR fa.acctvalue >= '__FROMACCOUNTID__') AND ('__TOACCOUNTID__' = '' OR fa.acctvalue <= '__TOACCOUNTID__') GROUP BY fa.fact_acct_group_id, fa.dateacct, fa.acctvalue, fa.acctdescription, fa.record_id, fa.ad_table_id, fa.account_id, fa.factaccttype, (CASE fa.amtacctdr WHEN 0 THEN (CASE SIGN(fa.amtacctcr) WHEN -1 THEN 1 ELSE 2 END) ELSE (CASE SIGN(fa.amtacctdr) WHEN -1 THEN 3 ELSE 4 END) END) HAVING (SUM(fa.amtacctdr) <> 0 OR SUM(fa.amtacctcr) <> 0)) SELECT dateacct, entry_no, document_type, fact_acct_group_id, record_id, ad_table_id, account_no, account_name, amtacctdr, amtacctcr FROM je ORDER BY dateacct, fact_acct_group_id, min_seqno
